sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45599" key="e)fammati/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐφαμμ-ᾰτίζω</orth>, <sense id="n45599.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bind upon</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">together</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:49:22:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49.22.23</biblScope></bibl>, cj. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg003:48" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Fasc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">48</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
